meaning: n.庞然大物,非凡的人(或物)n.小鬼,小家伙,茁壮的孩子
examples: Hoover was building his reputation as a crime-buster.
These door buster deals will last until July 31, 2013.
Stress is a known memory buster.
And Mr Aso has chosen Shoichi Nakagawa, a potential budget-buster like himself, as finance minister.
King's Lynn Stars promoter Buster Chapman was pleased to see Ward back in the team.
